sessionStartLines: - project default: keep Gateway long tasks phase-oriented, resume-friendly, and biased toward execution-surface reuse.
routeRecommendations: Prefer SendMessage or reuse of the active team/worktree before creating another parallel branch.
If retries are accumulating, switch to diagnosis or verification before another implementation hop.

shapingNotes: For this repository, long-running Agent tasks should stay phase-scoped and always report touched files plus validation evidence.

notes: Project default: an active team already exists, so prefer reusing it rather than spinning up another parallel group.
